nodes.label: AI as coding assistant for problem-solving and debugging
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable code generator requiring correction
nodes.grounding_span: I usually ask the AI a question and get some resulting code suggestions. I usually go back and forth with the AI, as sometimes the AI writes code that doesn't do exactly what is desired.

nodes.label: AI as writing assistant for professional polish
nodes.label_negative: AI as unnecessary for tasks where I am certain
nodes.grounding_span: AI at work has made me feel particularly satisfied in that it can help me write more professional sounding paragraphs for my annual performance review.

nodes.label: AI as fallible tool requiring human oversight
nodes.grounding_span: Since I know that AI is not perfect (and neither am I), I have to be skeptical about the output and double check it.

nodes.label: Human judgment for critical data tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI involvement in critical data tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when working with databases and potential updates to important data, I prefer to handle those myself, working with a co-worker to analyze any potential issues.

nodes.label: AI as mainstream tool influenced by workplace culture
nodes.label_negative: AI as niche or optional tool
nodes.grounding_span: Due to that influence, I now think about how AI can help more often that AI is going more mainstream.

nodes.label: Professional competence and quality output
nodes.grounding_span: help me write more professional sounding paragraphs for my annual performance review

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in work
nodes.grounding_span: human involvement is very important to keep AI in check to make sure the output is correct and desired

nodes.label: Personal autonomy and control over critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to handle those myself, working with a co-worker

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for writing polish
nodes.grounding_span: AI at work has made me feel particularly satisfied in that it can help me write more professional sounding paragraphs

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI output requiring verification
nodes.grounding_span: I have to be skeptical about the output and double check it

nodes.label: Preference for human collaboration over AI in critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: when working with databases and potential updates to important data, I prefer to handle those myself, working with a co-worker

nodes.label: Openness to AI as it becomes more mainstream
nodes.grounding_span: I now think about how AI can help more often that AI is going more mainstream

nodes.label: Iterative back-and-forth refinement
nodes.grounding_span: I usually go back and forth with the AI

nodes.label: Strategic task delegation based on certainty
nodes.grounding_span: Many times there are tasks that I am certain of, so I don't want AI involved
